documentation.description:
Ada_Modbus.Transport.TCP - TCP socket transport backend
Copyright (c) 2026 Florian Fischer
SPDX-License-Identifier: MIT

Provides TCP/IP transport using GNAT.Sockets (cross-platform)
Can be used as client (connect to server) or server (accept connections)

simple_types.name: Connection_State
simple_types.code: type Connection_State is (Disconnected, Connected, Listening, Error);

subprograms.name: Accept_Connection
Connect
Listen
Receive
Receive_Frame
Send
subprograms.code: function Send (Conn : in out TCP_Connection; Data : Byte_Array) return Natural

subprograms.name: Send_Frame
